title: Claude Lane Stack task re-review receipt v2
description: Control-plane receipt that binds a Codex re-review to one immutable task attempt and the exact reviewed Git worktree state.

base_ref.description: Immutable full Git commit object id; symbolic or abbreviated refs are forbidden.

reviewed_diff_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the exact stdout bytes from git diff --no-ext-diff --binary --full-index BASE_REF --. If RUN_DIR is inside project_cwd, both reviewer and accept exclude its relative subtree with a Git exclude pathspec.

reviewed_tree_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical lane-review-tree-v1 payload: header plus NUL, ASCII base_ref plus NUL, 8-byte big-endian diff length, exact reviewed diff bytes, then git-visible untracked files sorted by raw path bytes. Each untracked record is 8-byte path length, raw path, one-byte kind (f regular, x executable, l symlink), 8-byte content length, and file bytes or symlink-target bytes. RUN_DIR is excluded when nested in project_cwd.
